_notes.purpose: Non-length-ish length tokens: percent (%) and grid fraction (fr).
_notes.ir_shape_percent_on_width: Width percentage may serialize as an IRPercentage shape or a length-with-original {u:'PERCENT'} depending on the property's value type. Document actual shape from converter output.
_notes.ir_shape_fr: FR units typically appear inside grid-template-columns; same length shape with u='FR'.
